RESET_PLUGIN_SETTINGS_DESC: WARNING! This permanently deletes your current settings. This will also restart the Steam client, no Steam data will be affected.
OTA_REINSTALL_1_MIN: Reinstall can take up to 1 minute
OTA_UPDATE_1_MIN: Update can take up to 1 minute
DETECT_AMD_UNDERVOLT_DESC: Check if your device supports ryzenadj-based CPU undervolting. If it does, you should see a toggle appear in the advanced options. This will reboot Steam.
ADVANCED_ENABLE_TDP_CONTROLS_DESC: Enables TDP Sliders, and other advanced options
ADVANCED_ENABLE_MANUAL_CPU_CONTROLS_DESC: Enables manual CPU boost, SMT, Power Governor, and EPP controls
ADVANCED_ENABLE_SIMPLE_EPP_LABELS_DESC: Enables more intuitive labels for EPP and Power Governor
ADVANCED_ENABLE_AUTO_CPU_MANAGEMENT_DESC: Enables automatic management of CPU Boost, EPP, SMT, and Governor
ADVANCED_ENABLE_AC_POWER_PROFILES: Enable per-game AC power TDP profiles
ADVANCED_ENABLE_AC_POWER_PROFILES_DESC: When plugged into AC power, use a separate per-game TDP profile. Per-game profiles must be enabled
ADVANCED_ENABLE_BACKGROUND_POLLING_DESC: Polling will set TDP every few seconds
ADVANCED_FORCE_DISABLE_TDP_ON_RESUME: Force Disable Setting TDP on Resume
ADVANCED_FORCE_DISABLE_TDP_ON_RESUME_DES: Disable automatically setting TDP, etc, on resume
ADVANCED_FORCE_DISABLE_SUSPEND_ACTIONS_D: Disable any suspend-related changes, etc, when you suspend your device
ADVANCED_MAX_TDP_ON_RESUME_DESC: When you resume from suspend, temporarily sets TDP to max value for X seconds.
ADVANCED_RYZENADJ_UNDERVOLT_DESC: Warning, use carefully. Value for the ryzenadj --set-coall flag
ADVANCED_TEMP_MAX_TDP_PROFILE_DESC: When you start a game, temporarily sets TDP to max value for X seconds.
ADVANCED_FORCE_OVERRIDE_MAX_TDP_DESC: Warning, only use this if you know what you are doing. Sets 120W max TDP limit
ADVANCED_DECK_ENABLE_TDP_ADJUSTMENT_DESC: Warning, this needs a custom bios on the Steam Deck
ADVANCED_DECK_ENABLE_CUSTOM_GPU_CLOCK_DE: Warning, this needs a custom bios on the Steam Deck
ADVANCED_ASUS_EXTREME_POWERSAVE_DESC: Reduces power consumption during suspend. WARNING, this requires updated MCU firmware and updated Asus-Linux kernel modules
ADVANCED_ASUS_USE_WMI_DESC: Use Asus WMI calls instead of ryzenadj
